description: Elite Serbian volunteer paramilitary unit founded and led by Željko Ražnatović (Arkan) on 11 October 1990. Fought in the Croatian War and Bosnian War, known for discipline and effectiveness but also for war crimes and massacres. Operated with backing from Serbian State Security Directorate and was disbanded in April 1996.

country_links.evidence_quote: fighting in the Croatian War and the Bosnian War during the Yugoslav Wars
country_links.context: The Serb Volunteer Guard fought in the Bosnian War and committed ethnic cleansing and massacres there.

country_links.evidence_quote: smuggling petrol into Serbia from Bulgaria and Romania
country_links.context: The Serb Volunteer Guard smuggled petrol from Bulgaria into Serbia.
